# Integration Checklist: Optional gh-stack stack manager integration

**Purpose**: Validate integration requirement quality for optional `gh stack`, explicit `gh` fallback, and shared stack-manager evidence.
**Created**: 2026-06-14
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are `gh stack` command availability, installed extension identity, version capture, repository enablement, read-only proof, and topology compatibility requirements all defined before mutation? [Verified, Completeness, Spec §FR-001, Spec §FR-002, Plan §Technical Context, Tasks T017-T023]
- [x] CHK002 Are unsupported, missing, ambiguous, private-preview-unavailable, read-only-proof-failed, and topology-incompatible `gh stack` cases all required to select explicit `gh` fallback before mutation? [Verified, Completeness, Spec §FR-004, Quickstart §2, Tasks T016-T017/T028/T043]
- [x] CHK003 Are supported emission and restack requirements both covered by the same detector and decision contract rather than caller-specific ad hoc fields? [Verified, Consistency, Spec §FR-015, Plan §Phase 1, Tasks T012/T035/T050]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK004 Is safe read-only proof defined as parseable `gh stack view --json` topology evidence checked against PRS/marker topology, with mutating dry runs excluded? [Verified, Clarity, Spec §Assumptions, Research §Decision 2, Tasks T022/T031]
- [x] CHK005 Is the fallback path clearly defined as packet-owned `gh pr create/edit --base --head --title --body-file` before mutation? [Verified, Clarity, Spec §FR-004, Spec §FR-008, Research §Decision 3, Tasks T036/T038]
- [x] CHK006 Are selected `gh stack` commands limited to version-proven link, sync, and restack operations, with `submit` excluded from packet-owned PR creation? [Verified, Clarity, Plan §Command Capability Matrix, Research §Decision 3, Tasks T037/T052]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK007 Does the schema expose the same `gh_stack.supported` and `gh_stack.reason` evidence named by workflow success criteria, detection output expectations, and reviewer-facing evidence requirements? [Resolved, Consistency, Workflow §Success Criteria Summary, Spec §FR-002, Data Model §gh-stack Evidence]
- [x] CHK008 Does the schema require a non-empty command plan and a concrete fallback reason for `explicit-gh` decisions so detection, emission, restack, and reviewer evidence cannot diverge? [Resolved, Consistency, Spec §FR-002, Spec §SC-003, Contract §stack-manager-decision]
- [x] CHK009 Are PRSG-012 packet validation and PRSG-013 marker order requirements consistent across supported `gh-stack` and explicit fallback paths? [Verified, Consistency, Spec §FR-006, Spec §FR-007, Quickstart §3, Tasks T031/T036]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK010 Are Layer 4 fixtures required for supported, missing, unsupported, ambiguous, read-only-proof-failed, topology-incompatible, fallback, blocked, duplicate-retry, supported-restack, and fallback-restack scenarios? [Verified, Coverage, Spec §FR-017, Quickstart §Validation Scenarios, Tasks T013-T017/T027-T033/T042-T049]
- [x] CHK011 Are Layer 7 replay expectations scoped to orchestration and operator-facing evidence terms without real `gh`, network PR creation, or live transcript refresh? [Verified, Coverage, Spec §FR-023, Quickstart §9, Tasks T057/T059/T064]
- [x] CHK012 Are Claude Code and Codex guidance parity requirements defined without duplicating scripts, schemas, or validators under `codex-skills/`? [Verified, Coverage, Spec §FR-016, Quickstart §10, Tasks T058/T060-T063/T065]

## Notes

- Initial integration pass found schema/prose drift in stack-manager evidence fields and schema strictness for fallback command-plan evidence; these were resolved in `spec.md`, `plan.md`, `data-model.md`, `quickstart.md`, and `contracts/stack-manager-decision.schema.json`.
- Analyze verified the remaining checklist items against generated tasks and marked them complete; no unresolved integration checklist gap remains.
